creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comments #17 and #20)
> So... are you going to remove these bogus warnings or not?
> Yeah sure [disabling COMPAT option] works for me.
I went with less intrusive approach suggested by David rather than removing the warnings, mostly because I do not want to change upstream behavior of these scripts which users might rely upon.  Let's see if turning COMPAT option off would suffice for now.
